metadata.title: Wervice - Moroccan Wedding Planning
metadata.description: Authentic Moroccan weddings made easy with categories like Venues, Dresses, and Decor. Plan your perfect celebration with traditional henna, kaftans, and Amaria processions.
metadata.keywords: Moroccan weddings, henna ceremonies, kaftans, Amaria processions, Riad venues, traditional catering, wedding planning Morocco

hero.title: Plan your Moroccan wedding, your way.
hero.subtitle: Find trusted vendors across Morocco.

traditionalRiad.description: Beautiful traditional Moroccan riad in the heart of Marrakech

authenticCatering.title: Authentic Moroccan Catering
authenticCatering.description: Traditional Moroccan cuisine with modern presentation

professionalPhotography.title: Professional Wedding Photography
professionalPhotography.description: Capture your special moments with experienced photographers

hennaCeremony.title: Henna Ceremony Package
hennaCeremony.description: Traditional henna ceremony with skilled artists

exclusiveDiscounts.title: Exclusive Discounts
exclusiveDiscounts.description: Up to 30% off on premium vendors

footer.title: Wervice

premium.title: + Wervice Premium
premium.description: Unlimited planning tools, exclusive vendor discounts across all categories, and tradition timelines – starting at 500 MAD/month.

ultimate.title: Ultimate Moroccan Wedding Package
ultimate.description: From Casablanca to Fes – save big on your dream Moroccan celebration with our comprehensive wedding packages.
